title: With One Wheel Change, the Paradigm of Gravel Racing Has Changed Forever
content:
When Keegan Swenson gave up his wheel at Unbound Gravel on Saturday, team tactics were taken to a level never before seen in a sport defined until now by solo privateers.

Read the full article at With One Wheel Change, the Paradigm of Gravel Racing Has Changed Forever on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
